use_cases: Displaying and managing a list of tasks with completion status in a card interface
Tracking personal or team productivity goals with real-time date/time display
Showing celebratory feedback when all tasks are completed with confetti animation
Resetting a task list to its initial state after completion
Adding checkbox-style interaction for marking items as done or pending
ai_summary: A TodoCard component that displays a list of tasks with toggle functionality, real-time date and time display, and a confetti celebration animation when all items are completed. Built with React hooks for state management, it provides a complete task management UI within a single card container, suitable for productivity apps and project tracking interfaces.
